extDesc.message: Automatically replace specified text on web pages. Image text replacement coming soon.

langToggle.description: Label shown on language toggle button

fromPh.message: Plain text, or a regex pattern

regexHelpHtml.message:
Basic Match Rules

  • Exact match: what you enter is what gets matched. cat only matches cat.
  • Any single character: ., so c.t can match cat, cot, cut.
  • Any number of characters: .*, so c.*t can match ct, cat, connect.

Common Regex Symbols

SymbolMeaningExample
\dAny digit202\d
\wLetter, digit, or underscoreuser_\w
^Start of text^Apple
$End of textEnd$
+One or more\d+
?Zero or oneapples?

toastFromRequired.message: Enter source text, or enable random number / amount increase

pickPrompt.message: Click target element  ·  Esc to cancel

toastTempFromRequired.message: Enter source text, or enable random number / amount increase

helpS1Desc.message: Saved to local storage and applied automatically on every page load. Rules survive browser restarts.

helpS2Desc.message: Applies the current From / To inputs and scope settings to the page immediately without saving. Resets when the page refreshes.

helpS3Desc.message:
URL Scope: controls which pages the rule applies to.
Limit to element: only replaces text within a CSS selector. Use ⊕ Pick to select the element visually.

helpS4Desc.message:
By default only visible text nodes are replaced.
Enable Input fields to also replace input / textarea values; enable Rich text to also replace contenteditable editor content.

helpS5Desc.message: Saved rules run in order. Click × to delete one, Clear All to remove all. Colored badges indicate scope or replacement mode.

helpS6Desc.message: The source text chooses the match mode automatically: plain text matches exactly; patterns containing ., .*, \d, \w, +, ?, and similar rules are treated as regular expressions.

helpS7Desc.message: Enable this under Features to automatically match numbers and amounts on the page, then randomly increase them within the configured range. Values are cached, so page refreshes stay consistent. Refresh Increments clears the cache and reloads the current page to draw new values.
